metadata.title: Photocall - Photo Booth Kiosk for Events
metadata.description: A modern photo booth kiosk for weddings, parties, corporate events, and celebrations. Easy setup, beautiful templates, instant sharing. Capture memorable moments.
metadata.keywords: photo booth, event photo booth, wedding photo booth, party photos, corporate events, kiosk, photo kiosk, instant photos, QR sharing, event photography

hero.title: Capture Unforgettable
hero.subtitle: A modern photo booth kiosk for weddings, parties, and corporate events. Easy setup, beautiful templates, instant sharing.

easyCapture.title: Easy Capture
easyCapture.description: Large touch controls, countdown timer, and instant preview. Perfect for guests of all ages.

beautifulTemplates.title: Beautiful Templates
beautifulTemplates.description: Customize with your own frames and overlays. Add captions to personalize each photo.

instantSharing.title: Instant Sharing
instantSharing.description: Guests get a QR code to instantly download and share their photos. No app needed.

easyExport.title: Easy Export
easyExport.description: Download all photos as a ZIP. Perfect for creating albums and sharing memories later.

step1.title: Set Up
step1.description: Configure your templates and settings in the admin panel. Upload your custom frames.

step2.title: Capture
step2.description: Guests tap to start, choose a template, and take their photo with a fun countdown.

step3.title: Share
step3.description: Scan the QR code to instantly download and share. Print directly from the kiosk.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Set up your photo booth in minutes. No installation required.

footer.tagline: Photocall - Photo Booth Kiosk for Events

legal.disclaimer: This is a standard template provided for convenience and does not constitute legal advice. It should be reviewed by a qualified professional before being relied upon.

camera.errorPermissionDenied: Camera access was blocked. Please allow camera access, then try again.
camera.errorNoCamera: No camera was found. Connect a camera and try again.
camera.errorInUse: The camera is in use by another app. Close it, then try again.
camera.errorTimeout: The camera didn't start in time. Please try again.
camera.errorUnsupported: This device or browser cannot access the camera.
camera.errorUnknown: Something went wrong starting the camera. Please try again.
camera.errorStuck: The camera didn't start in time. Please try again.

error.title: Something interrupted the kiosk
error.description: Don't worry, your event is fine. Tap the button below to start over.

offline.waiting: {count, plural, one {# photo waiting to sync} other {# photos waiting to sync}}

print.pending: {count, plural, one {# print waiting} other {# prints waiting}}
print.pendingWithReason: {count, plural, one {# print waiting} other {# prints waiting}} — {reason}

attract.eventNotFoundDescription: This event is not active or does not exist.
attract.couldNotStart: Could not start session. Please try again.
attract.pinDialogDescription: Unlock kiosk admin controls. Configure the PIN from event settings.

consent.title: Photo Consent
consent.description: By continuing, you agree to have your photo taken and stored for this event. Your photo may be displayed in the event slideshow and available for download via a unique link.
consent.retention: Photos will be automatically deleted after {days} days.

select.noTemplatesSubtitle: There are no frames for this event yet — you can still take your photos.

capture.captureFailed: Failed to capture photo. Please try again.
capture.couldNotReadFrame: Could not read a frame from the camera.

boomerang.modeStripDescription: Snap a set of photos for a classic strip
boomerang.captureFailed: Could not create the boomerang. Please try again.

result.savedOfflineDescription: You're offline right now. Your photo will upload automatically and you'll get a link to share once you're back online.
result.printerOffline: Printer offline — will print when it reconnects.
result.photosNotFound: We couldn't find your photos. Please try again.
result.processFailed: Failed to process your photo. Please try again.

orgs.title: Your Organizations
orgs.subtitle: Manage your photo booth events across organizations
orgs.createDialogDescription: Organizations help you manage events and team members.
orgs.emptyDescription: Create your first organization to start managing events
orgs.notFoundDescription: The organization you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access.

events.title: Events
events.createDialogDescription: Create a new photo booth event for your organization.
events.emptyDescription: Create your first event to start capturing memories

team.title: Team
team.inviteDialogDescription: Send an invitation to join your organization.
team.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
team.confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove this member?

settings.title: Settings
settings.onlyAdminsCanEdit: Only owners and admins can change these settings.
settings.slugHelp: Used in dashboard and kiosk URLs. The slug can't be changed.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting an organization permanently removes its events, photos, and templates. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes the organization and all of its events, photos, and templates. Type {name} to confirm.
settings.confirmNameLabel: Type the organization name to confirm

event.galleryEmptyDescription: Photos will appear here as guests capture them
event.templatesEmptyDescription: Add overlay templates for your photo booth

share.title: Share album
share.subtitle: Share the guest album with a QR code
share.albumDisabledBody: Enable the guest album in the event settings to get a shareable link and QR code.

trash.title: Recycling bin
trash.subtitle: Restore deleted photos or remove them permanently
trash.emptyDescription: Deleted photos appear here and are removed permanently after 30 days
trash.count: {count, plural, =1 {# deleted photo} other {# deleted photos}}
trash.purgesIn: Deletes permanently in {days, plural, =0 {less than a day} =1 {1 day} other {# days}}
trash.confirmPurge: Permanently delete this photo? This cannot be undone.

general.coupleHostsHelp: Shown on photobooth strips via the {token} token
general.slideshowOnIdleHelp: Show recent photos when kiosk is idle

branding.accentColorHelp: Secondary highlight used on the kiosk (countdown, photo code). Falls back to the primary color when empty.
branding.kioskLogoHelp: Shown on the kiosk attract screen. PNG or SVG with a transparent background works best.
branding.kioskTextFontHelp: Override the kiosk's copy. Leave a field empty to use the built-in translated default for the guest's language.
branding.displayFontHelp: Applied to kiosk headings (attract title, consent and thank-you).
branding.attractTitleHelp: Default: couple/hosts name, otherwise the event name.
branding.consentTextPlaceholder: By continuing, you agree to have your photo taken…
branding.showPoweredByHelp: Toggle the footer credit on the kiosk attract screen.
branding.skipConsentHelp: Go straight to the photo booth without showing the consent step. Only enable this if you obtain guests' consent another way.

camera.defaultCameraHelp: Used when no specific capture device is selected below.
camera.captureDeviceHelp: Pick a specific webcam (e.g. a USB DSLR/capture device) for this kiosk.
camera.zoomHelp: Crop the camera tighter so guests don't have to stand far back. Applies to the live preview and the saved photo.
camera.mirrorHelp: Flip the photo horizontally, like a selfie. Affects the live preview and the saved photo.
camera.autoStartHelp: Begin the countdown automatically once the camera is ready, so guests don't have to tap to start the first shot
camera.autoShootHelp: Automatically chain shots instead of tapping for each one
camera.boomerangModeHelp: Let guests record a short looping GIF instead of a photo strip

print.printMethodHelp: How composited strips are printed at the booth.
print.printBridgeUrlHelp: Base URL of the print bridge on your network, e.g. http://raspberrypi.local:3200
print.bridgeReachableNoPrinters: Bridge reachable, but no printers were discovered yet.
print.borderlessHelp: Print edge-to-edge with no white margin
print.autoPrintHelp: Print automatically once the photo is composed
print.bridgeUrlBlankHint: Leave blank to auto-discover the bridge on your network ({url}).
print.copiesTwoUpHint: On a 2-up template (two strips per sheet), each copy prints 2 strips — so copies × 2 strips per sheet.

security.kioskAdminPinHelp: Set a PIN to access admin features from the kiosk
security.dangerZoneHelp: Permanently delete this event and all its data.
security.confirmDeleteEvent: Are you sure you want to delete this event? This action cannot be undone.

templates.title: Template Manager
templates.addDialogDescription: Upload a PNG overlay for your photo booth frames.
templates.emptyDescription: Design a template from scratch in the editor, or start from one of the presets below.
templates.presetsDescription: Pick a ready-made design and customize it in the editor.
templates.confirmDelete: Delete this template? This cannot be undone.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.signUpSubtitle: Sign up to get started with Photocall
auth.name: Name
auth.quote: “Photocall transformed our wedding reception. Our guests loved capturing moments and the instant sharing feature was a hit!”
auth.tagline: Create memorable photo experiences for any event

error.title: Dashboard error
error.description: We couldn't load this view. Retry or return to your organizations list.

print.title: Print Management
print.subtitle: Monitor printers and the live print queue over your network
print.configureInSettings: Configure the print bridge URL in
print.bridgeNoUrl: No print bridge URL is configured for this event.
print.bridgeUnreachable: Could not reach the print bridge.
print.addPrinterHelp: Manual fallback when a printer is not discovered automatically. Enter an IPP URI or a host/IP.
print.noPrinters: No printers discovered yet. Add one by IP above.
print.outOfPaper: Out of paper — refill the media to resume printing.
print.testPrintSent: Test print sent to the bridge.
print.reprintSent: Test card sent to the bridge.
print.testPrintFailed: Could not generate the test image.
print.queuedOfflineNote: Waiting on this device — will print when the bridge reconnects.
print.reprintTestCardHint: Sends a fresh test card (a solid-color page), NOT the guest's last photo — the bridge does not keep submitted images.

share.notFoundDescription: This photo may have expired or been deleted.
